mapper.select: select campaign_id, company_Nm, company_Ph, campaign_Title, recruitment_Num, applicants_Num, campaign_pay, time_segment, place_Addr, mission, type_code, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE 'X' END) AS type_nm, leader_code, u.user_nm, app_period_str, app_period_end, event_period_str, event_period_end, result_date, u.account_number, u.bank_nm, u.depositor, phone_hash from campaign c left outer join user u on leader_code = id where campaign_id = #{id} and c.is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT campaign_id, applied_str_date, applied_end_date FROM user_campaign WHERE user_id = #{userId}

select uc.user_id, uc.campaign_id, uc.user_no, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, c.event_period_str, c.event_period_end from user_campaign uc left outer join campaign c on uc.campaign_id = c.campaign_id where uc.user_Id= #{userId} and uc.campaign_id = #{campaignId} and uc.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_campaign( campaign_id, user_No, user_id, lead_apply, applied_str_date, applied_end_date, event_str_date, event_end_date, time_segment, apply_date ) values
( #{entry.campaignId}, #{entry.userNo}, #{entry.userId}, #{entry.leadApply}, #{entry.appliedStrDate}, #{entry.appliedEndDate}, #{entry.eventPeriodStr}, #{entry.eventPeriodEnd}, #{entry.timeSegment}, #{entry.applyDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.campaign_id, c.campaign_Title, c.recruitment_Num, c.applicants_Num, f.saved_name, f.file_path, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, event_Period_str, event_Period_End, campaign_pay, t.user_nm, t.phone_num as leader_phone, t.user_id, t.id FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN files f ON c.campaign_id = f.target_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user t on c.leader_code = t.id Where f.is_deleted = 'N' AND f.target_type = 'campaign' AND c.is_active = 'N' ORDER BY c.campaign_id desc

SELECT c.campaign_id, c.campaign_Title, c.recruitment_Num, c.applicants_Num, c.company_ph, f.saved_name, f.file_path, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, event_Period_str, event_Period_End, campaign_pay, t.user_nm, t.phone_num as leader_phone FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN files f ON c.campaign_id = f.target_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user t on c.leader_code = t.id Where f.is_deleted = 'N' AND f.target_type = 'campaign' AND c.campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND recruitment_Num = applicants_Num ORDER BY c.campaign_id desc

SELECT c.campaign_id, c.campaign_Title, c.recruitment_Num, c.applicants_Num, f.saved_name, f.file_path, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, campaign_pay, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, event_Period_str, event_Period_End, t.user_nm FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN files f ON c.campaign_id = f.target_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user t on c.leader_code = t.id Where f.is_deleted = 'N' and f.target_type = 'campaign' and c.is_deleted = 'N' and c.app_Period_end >= now() and c.applicants_Num <= c.recruitment_Num and c.is_active = 'Y' and campaign_title like CONCAT('%', #{schCamp}, '%') ORDER BY c.applicants_Num DESC, c.campaign_id desc

SELECT c.campaign_id, c.campaign_Title, c.recruitment_Num, c.applicants_Num, f.saved_name, f.file_path, time_segment, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, campaign_pay, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, event_Period_str, event_Period_End, t.user_nm FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN files f ON c.campaign_id = f.target_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user t ON c.leader_code = t.id Where f.is_deleted = 'N' AND f.target_type = 'campaign' AND c.is_deleted = 'N' AND c.type_code = '02' AND c.app_Period_end >= now() AND c.applicants_Num <= c.recruitment_Num AND c.is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY c.applicants_Num DESC, c.campaign_id desc

SELECT c.campaign_id, c.campaign_Title, c.recruitment_Num, c.applicants_Num, f.saved_name, f.file_path, time_segment, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, campaign_pay, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, event_Period_str, event_Period_End, t.user_nm FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN files f ON c.campaign_id = f.target_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user t ON c.leader_code = t.id Where f.is_deleted = 'N' AND f.target_type = 'campaign' AND c.is_deleted = 'N' AND c.type_code = '01' AND c.app_Period_end >= now() AND c.applicants_Num <= c.recruitment_Num AND c.is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY c.applicants_Num DESC, c.campaign_id desc

SELECT c.campaign_id, c.campaign_Title, c.recruitment_Num, c.applicants_Num, f.saved_name, f.file_path, time_segment, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, campaign_pay, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, event_Period_str, event_Period_End, t.user_nm FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN files f ON c.campaign_id = f.target_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user t ON c.leader_code = t.id Where f.is_deleted = 'N' AND f.target_type = 'campaign' AND c.is_deleted = 'N' AND c.type_code = '03' AND c.app_Period_end >= now() AND c.applicants_Num <= c.recruitment_Num AND c.is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY c.applicants_Num DESC, c.campaign_id desc
mapper.update: UPDATE user_campaign SET is_deleted = 'Y' WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND user_no = #{userNo} AND apply_date = #{applyDate} AND is_deleted = 'N'
